functions.name: addHuggingFaceModel
functions.description: Adds a model from Hugging Face to the Ollama resource. Only models in GGUF format are supported.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource.

parameters.name: modelName
parameters.description: The name of the LLM from Hugging Face in GGUF format to download on initial startup.

functions.name: addModel
functions.description: Adds a model to the Ollama resource.
functions.remarks: The resource name is generated from `modelName` when you do not specify one explicitly.

parameters.name: modelName
parameters.description: The name of the LLM to download on initial startup.

functions.name: addNamedModel
functions.description: Adds a model to the Ollama resource.
functions.remarks: Use this overload when you need to control the generated resource name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource.

parameters.name: modelName
parameters.description: The name of the LLM to download on initial startup.

functions.name: addOllama
functions.description: Adds an Ollama container resource to the application model.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: An optional fixed port to bind to the Ollama container. This will be provided randomly by Aspire if not set.

functions.name: addOllamaLocal
functions.description: Adds an Ollama executable resource to the application model.
functions.signature: addOllamaLocal(name: string, port?: number, targetPort?: number): OllamaExecutableResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: An optional fixed port to bind to the Ollama process. This will be provided randomly by Aspire if not set.

parameters.name: targetPort
parameters.description: An optional fixed port to run the Ollama process. This will default to 11434 if not set.

functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the Ollama server.

functions.description: Gets the Host property

functions.name: modelName

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the Open WebUI endpoint.

functions.name: host
functions.description: Gets the host endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: ollamaResources
functions.description: Gets the list of Ollama resources that are associated with this Open WebUI resource.

functions.name: port
functions.description: Gets the port endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: primaryEndpoint
functions.description: Gets the http endpoint for the Open WebUI resource.

functions.name: uriExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection URI expression for the Open WebUI endpoint.
functions.remarks: Format: `http://{host}:{port}`. The scheme reflects the endpoint configuration and may be `https` when TLS is enabled.

functions.name: withDataVolume
functions.description: Adds a data volume to the Ollama container.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

parameters.name: isReadOnly
parameters.description: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only volume.

functions.name: withDataVolume
functions.description: Adds a data volume to the Open WebUI container.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

parameters.name: isReadOnly
parameters.description: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only volume.

functions.name: withGPUSupport
functions.description: Adds GPU support to the Ollama container.
functions.remarks: This will add the right arguments to the container to enable GPU support as per .

parameters.name: vendor
parameters.description: The GPU vendor, defaults to Nvidia.

functions.name: withHostPort
functions.description: Configures the host port that the Open WebUI resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.
functions.returns: The resource builder for Open WebUI.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port to bind on the host. If `null` is used random port will be assigned.

functions.name: withOpenWebUI
functions.description: Adds an Open WebUI container to the application model for administering Ollama. This version of the package defaults to the main tag of the Open WebUI container image.
functions.remarks: See https://openwebui.com for more information about Open WebUI
functions.signature: withOpenWebUI(configureContainer?: (obj: OpenWebUIResource) => Promise<void>, containerName?: string): IOllamaResource

parameters.name: configureContainer
parameters.description: Configuration callback for Open WebUI container resource.

parameters.name: containerName
parameters.description: The name of the container (Optional).
